calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/E. Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Brian Gearinger, Esq. for Plaintiff: Andrea Bornstein, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: MArk Jessup and Pamela Jessup as follows:
Principal $50,750.00
Attorney Fees $ 0.00
Interest $ 0.00
Costs $ 328.80
for a total of $51,078.80

Judgment signed in open court.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Text Ruling
